message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.1.13

Includes since v0.1.12:
- feat(ready): --parent and --recursive flags for scoped filtering
- fix(sync): normalize labels during JSONL export
- fix: detect and warn about conflicting br installations
- fix(update): prevent claiming blocked issues
- fix(sync): allow rename-prefix import & clean prefixes
- fix(release): use architecture-appropriate minisign on ARM64
- feat(cli): add config key completion, shell completions
- Add darwin/arm64 and darwin/amd64 targets to release workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.12"
+version = "0.1.13"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
